name: overlord
description: Overlord ticket protocol workflow for Claude Code — attach/update/ask/deliver, slash commands, and hook-driven activity capture.

overlord_url.title: Overlord URL
overlord_url.description: Overlord platform URL (e.g. https://www.ovld.ai or http://localhost:3000).

agent_token.title: Agent token
agent_token.description: Overlord agent token. Pull from Overlord Settings → Agents & MCP or from ~/.ovld/credentials.json.
